This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Gyroscope: Permissions-Policy allow='gyroscope' attribute allows same-origin relocation
  test_feature_availability is not defined
[FAIL] Gyroscope: Permissions-Policy allow='gyroscope' attribute disallows cross-origin relocation
  test_feature_availability is not defined
Harness: the test ran to completion.
